name: Sarah Chen
title: Senior Solar Energy Analyst
bio: Sarah Chen is our Senior Solar Energy Analyst with over 10 years of experience in the renewable energy industry. She holds NABCEP PV Installation Professional certification and has evaluated over 500 solar installations across 30 states. Her analysis has been cited by the Solar Energy Industries Association (SEIA) and the National Renewable Energy Laboratory (NREL).
credentials: Former consultant for NREL and SEIA
expertise: Solar panel efficiency and performance analysis
image_alt: Sarah Chen, Senior Solar Energy Analyst at SolarSavingsAI

name: Michael Torres
title: Staff Writer & Researcher
bio: Michael Torres brings his electrical engineering background to make complex solar technology accessible to homeowners. With a B.S. in Electrical Engineering from Georgia Tech and 6 years of renewable energy journalism, he specializes in breaking down technical concepts into actionable advice. Michael has written over 300 articles on solar technology, installation, and policy.
image_alt: Michael Torres, Staff Writer and Researcher at SolarSavingsAI

name: Jennifer Wu
title: Financial Analyst
bio: Jennifer Wu is a CFA charterholder who specializes in solar financing and energy investment analysis. With 8 years of experience in clean energy finance, she has helped structure over $200 million in residential solar financing. Jennifer's expertise helps homeowners navigate the complex landscape of solar loans, leases, tax credits, and incentive programs.
credentials: M.B.A. Finance, Wharton School of Business
image_alt: Jennifer Wu, Financial Analyst at SolarSavingsAI

name: David Okafor
title: Technical Editor
bio: David Okafor is a former solar installer turned technical editor with 15 years of hands-on industry experience. He has personally installed over 1,000 residential solar systems across the Southeast and Southwest regions. David ensures all technical content on SolarSavingsAI is accurate, practical, and reflects real-world installation conditions.
image_alt: David Okafor, Technical Editor at SolarSavingsAI

name: Emily Watson
title: Solar Research & Energy Analyst
bio: Emily Watson is a solar research analyst focused on independent equipment and installer evaluations. Her work synthesizes product performance, warranty quality, customer sentiment, and financing tradeoffs to help homeowners make confident solar decisions.
credentials: 8+ years of residential solar market research
Specialist in product and installer review methodology
image_alt: Emily Watson, Solar Research and Energy Analyst at SolarSavingsAI
